title: Custom Scoreboard
body:
Custom Scoreboard Mod - Advanced Scoreboard Customization for Minecraft (Fabric + Kotlin)

Take full control of your Minecraft scoreboard with the Custom Scoreboard Mod, a powerful Fabric client-side modification. This mod allows players to personalize their scoreboard display, offering a wide range of customization options without compromising performance.

🌟 Key Features:

❌ Hide Scoreboard: Completely disable the scoreboard when you don’t need it.

🔢 Remove Red Numbers: Option to hide the red numbers/scores on the right side.

🌐 Adjust Opacity: Customize the transparency of the scoreboard title and body.

✂️ Selective Line Visibility: Choose which specific lines to hide for a cleaner view.

⚡ Optimized for Fabric: Fully compatible with Fabric API.

💎 Kotlin-Powered: Developed using Kotlin (requires Fabric-Language-Kotlin).

🛠️ Settings GUI: Easily configure settings via Mod Menu (required).

📌 Why Use Custom Scoreboard Mod?
Whether you’re a content creator looking for a clean HUD, a player wanting more focus, or simply someone who finds the scoreboard distracting, this mod offers the flexibility you need. No more clutter, just clean customization.

✅ Installation Instructions:

Ensure Fabric Loader is installed.

Install Fabric API, Fabric-Language-Kotlin, and Mod Menu.

Download Custom Scoreboard Mod and place it in your mods folder.

🔗 Download Now and Take Control of Your Scoreboard!
